title: Raccoon Removal in Harlem, Manhattan | $900 - $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Harlem, Manhattan. Safe, humane extraction from brownstones, apartments & commercial buildings. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Harlem's historic brownstones, pre-war apartment buildings, and tree-lined streets provide ideal habitats for raccoons seeking shelter and food sources. Our professional raccoon removal services in Harlem address infestations in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces throughout this vibrant Manhattan neighborhood. Best Pest Control NYC offers safe, humane raccoon extraction and exclusion services tailored to Harlem's unique architectural landscape.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Harlem residents and property owners for years with specialized knowledge of the neighborhood's building types, from classic brownstones to modern developments. Our licensed technicians use humane removal methods, provide complete exclusion services, and offer follow-up inspections to ensure raccoons don't return to your Harlem property.
localContext: Harlem's proximity to Morningside Park, St. Nicholas Park, and Marcus Garvey Park creates corridors for raccoon movement throughout the neighborhood. The area's mix of historic row houses, walk-up apartments, and commercial spaces along 125th Street requires specialized removal approaches that respect both the wildlife and the architectural integrity of these culturally significant buildings.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Harlem?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Harlem typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the number of raccoons, accessibility of the entry points, and whether repairs or exclusion work is needed. Brownstones and multi-story buildings may require additional equipment and labor, affecting the final price.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons common in Harlem?
faqs.answer: Harlem's abundant green spaces like Morningside Park and St. Nicholas Park, combined with the neighborhood's older buildings with accessible attics and chimneys, create ideal conditions for raccoons. The availability of food sources from residential garbage and the architectural features of historic brownstones provide perfect denning sites for these adaptable animals.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Harlem property?
faqs.answer: Most raccoon removals in Harlem can begin within 24-48 hours of your call. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the situation, including trapping, extraction, and initial exclusion work. If babies are present, we use specialized techniques to safely remove the entire family while adhering to humane wildlife control standards.

faqs.question: Do you offer raccoon prevention services for Harlem buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive raccoon exclusion and prevention services specifically designed for Harlem's building types. This includes sealing entry points in roofs, chimneys, and vents, installing chimney caps, reinforcing soffits and fascia, and providing recommendations for securing garbage areas. We also offer ongoing maintenance plans to ensure your property remains raccoon-free.
